turns.query: Analyze hourly emission variations of Jinan Steel Group Co., Ltd. during 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-11.
turns.actual_response:
冀南钢铁集团有限公司在2025-06-10至2025-06-11期间共有48个有效小时记录，数据覆盖完整。

分析结果如下：

- 两日累计烟气量：968,438,464.0 立方米
- 小时平均烟气量：20,175,802.08 立方米/小时
- 小时峰值烟气量：21,203,000.0 立方米/小时
- 小时最低烟气量：18,584,300.0 立方米/小时
- 小时烟气量变异系数：0.03139
- 小时烟气量总体标准差：633,258.29 立方米/小时

分日变化特征：

- 2025-06-10累计烟气量为478,146,784.0立方米，小时均值约19,922,783立方米/小时，峰值20,815,500立方米/小时，最低值18,584,300立方米/小时，变异系数0.03906。
- 2025-06-11累计烟气量为490,291,680.0立方米，小时均值约20,428,820立方米/小时，峰值21,203,000立方米/小时，最低值20,153,700立方米/小时，变异系数0.01281。

两日对比显示，6月11日累计烟气量比6月10日高12,144,896立方米，小时均值更高，且波动明显更小，说明6月11日排放工况更稳定；6月10日小时波动相对更强。

日内变化方面，平均烟气量较高的时段集中在傍晚至夜间，最高的5个小时为22时、21时、19时、18时和16时，其中22时平均烟气量最高，为20,945,900立方米/小时。平均烟气量较低的时段集中在凌晨，最低的5个小时为0时、1时、2时、4时和3时，其中0时最低，为19,499,500立方米/小时。

相邻小时变化显示，47个小时转换中，平均绝对变化量为203,980.85立方米/小时，最大相邻小时变化量为1,175,400.0立方米/小时；平均相邻小时变化率为1.02%，最大相邻小时变化率为6.07%。总体看，该企业两日内小时烟气量波动幅度较小，整体运行较稳定，但6月10日存在相对更明显的小时波动。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

company_name = "冀南钢铁集团有限公司"
start_ts = "2025-06-10 00:00:00"
end_ts = "2025-06-12 00:00:00"

# 先按企业名称与时间范围检查数据量
count_q = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission h
JOIN polluting_company c ON h.company_id = c.id
WHERE c.name = :company_name
  AND h.timestamp >= :start_ts
  AND h.timestamp < :end_ts
  AND h.exhaust_gas IS NOT NULL
""")
n = int(pd.read_sql(count_q, engine, params={"company_name": company_name, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts}).loc[0, "n"])

# 计算全时段核心统计量，并存入指定变量
stats_q = text("""
SELECT
  SUM(h.exhaust_gas)::float AS total_flue_gas,
  AVG(h.exhaust_gas)::float AS mean_flue_gas,
  MAX(h.exhaust_gas)::float AS peak_flue_gas,
  CASE WHEN AVG(h.exhaust_gas) = 0 THEN NULL
       ELSE (STDDEV_POP(h.exhaust_gas) / AVG(h.exhaust_gas))::float
  END AS cv_flue_gas,
  MIN(h.exhaust_gas)::float AS min_flue_gas,
  STDDEV_POP(h.exhaust_gas)::float AS std_flue_gas
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission h
JOIN polluting_company c ON h.company_id = c.id
WHERE c.name = :company_name
  AND h.timestamp >= :start_ts
  AND h.timestamp < :end_ts
  AND h.exhaust_gas IS NOT NULL
""")
stats = pd.read_sql(stats_q, engine, params={"company_name": company_name, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts}).iloc[0]
total_flue_gas = float(stats["total_flue_gas"]) if pd.notna(stats["total_flue_gas"]) else None
mean_flue_gas = float(stats["mean_flue_gas"]) if pd.notna(stats["mean_flue_gas"]) else None
peak_flue_gas = float(stats["peak_flue_gas"]) if pd.notna(stats["peak_flue_gas"]) else None
cv_flue_gas = float(stats["cv_flue_gas"]) if pd.notna(stats["cv_flue_gas"]) else None

# 按自然日汇总，比较两天差异
daily_q = text("""
SELECT
  DATE(h.timestamp) AS day,
  COUNT(*) AS valid_hours,
  SUM(h.exhaust_gas)::float AS total,
  AVG(h.exhaust_gas)::float AS mean,
  MAX(h.exhaust_gas)::float AS peak,
  MIN(h.exhaust_gas)::float AS min,
  CASE WHEN AVG(h.exhaust_gas)=0 THEN NULL ELSE (STDDEV_POP(h.exhaust_gas)/AVG(h.exhaust_gas))::float END AS cv
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission h
JOIN polluting_company c ON h.company_id = c.id
WHERE c.name = :company_name
  AND h.timestamp >= :start_ts
  AND h.timestamp < :end_ts
  AND h.exhaust_gas IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE(h.timestamp)
ORDER BY day
""")
daily = pd.read_sql(daily_q, engine, params={"company_name": company_name, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

# 按小时序号聚合，定位日内平均高低时段；打印前后若干个聚合结果而非原始明细
hourly_profile_q = text("""
SELECT
  EXTRACT(HOUR FROM h.timestamp)::int AS hour_of_day,
  COUNT(*) AS records,
  AVG(h.exhaust_gas)::float AS mean_exhaust_gas
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission h
JOIN polluting_company c ON h.company_id = c.id
WHERE c.name = :company_name
  AND h.timestamp >= :start_ts
  AND h.timestamp < :end_ts
  AND h.exhaust_gas IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM h.timestamp)
ORDER BY mean_exhaust_gas DESC
""")
hourly_profile = pd.read_sql(hourly_profile_q, engine, params={"company_name": company_name, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
top_hours = hourly_profile.head(5).copy()
low_hours = hourly_profile.tail(5).sort_values("mean_exhaust_gas").copy()

# 相邻小时变化幅度统计，用于表征小时波动强度
change_q = text("""
WITH x AS (
  SELECT
    h.timestamp,
    h.exhaust_gas,
    LAG(h.exhaust_gas) OVER (ORDER BY h.timestamp) AS prev_exhaust_gas
  FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission h
  JOIN polluting_company c ON h.company_id = c.id
  WHERE c.name = :company_name
    AND h.timestamp >= :start_ts
    AND h.timestamp < :end_ts
    AND h.exhaust_gas IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE prev_exhaust_gas IS NOT NULL) AS transitions,
  AVG(ABS(exhaust_gas - prev_exhaust_gas))::float AS mean_abs_hourly_change,
  MAX(ABS(exhaust_gas - prev_exhaust_gas))::float AS max_abs_hourly_change,
  AVG(CASE WHEN prev_exhaust_gas = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ABS(exhaust_gas - prev_exhaust_gas) / prev_exhaust_gas END)::float AS mean_abs_hourly_change_rate,
  MAX(CASE WHEN prev_exhaust_gas = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ABS(exhaust_gas - prev_exhaust_gas) / prev_exhaust_gas END)::float AS max_abs_hourly_change_rate
FROM x
""")
change_stats = pd.read_sql(change_q, engine, params={"company_name": company_name, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts}).iloc[0]

print("有效小时记录数:", n)
print("全时段统计:", {
    "total_flue_gas": total_flue_gas,
    "mean_flue_gas": mean_flue_gas,
    "peak_flue_gas": peak_flue_gas,
    "cv_flue_gas": cv_flue_gas,
    "min_flue_gas": float(stats["min_flue_gas"]) if pd.notna(stats["min_flue_gas"]) else None,
    "std_flue_gas": float(stats["std_flue_gas"]) if pd.notna(stats["std_flue_gas"]) else None
})
print("分日汇总:")
print(daily.to_string(index=False))
print("日内平均烟气量最高的5个小时:")
print(top_hours.to_string(index=False))
print("日内平均烟气量最低的5个小时:")
print(low_hours.to_string(index=False))
print("相邻小时变化统计:", {
    "transitions": int(change_stats["transitions"]) if pd.notna(change_stats["transitions"]) else 0,
    "mean_abs_hourly_change": float(change_stats["mean_abs_hourly_change"]) if pd.notna(change_stats["mean_abs_hourly_change"]) else None,
    "max_abs_hourly_change": float(change_stats["max_abs_hourly_change"]) if pd.notna(change_stats["max_abs_hourly_change"]) else None,
    "mean_abs_hourly_change_rate": float(change_stats["mean_abs_hourly_change_rate"]) if pd.notna(change_stats["mean_abs_hourly_change_rate"]) else None,
    "max_abs_hourly_change_rate": float(change_stats["max_abs_hourly_change_rate"]) if pd.notna(change_stats["max_abs_hourly_change_rate"]) else None
})
